## Photronics Faces Securities Class Action With September 4, 2026 Lead Plaintiff Deadline

Active securities litigation introduces a binary tail risk and potential management distraction; the September deadline marks when the litigation structure solidifies, warranting a position-sizing review ahead of that date.

- A securities class action lawsuit against Photronics (PLAB) is pending.
- Investors are being reminded of a September 4, 2026 lead plaintiff filing deadline.
- No details on the nature of the claims are present in the headline.
- Litigation overhang is now formally on the clock with a near-term legal milestone.
